overview.intro: NEURAL_INTERFACE_V2 IS A SECOND-GENERATION COGNITIVE BRIDGE BETWEEN HUMAN OPERATORS AND DISTRIBUTED COMPUTE CLUSTERS. IT REDUCES LATENCY TO NEAR-ZERO.
overview.body: Built on a custom protocol stack, the interface translates neural impulse patterns into structured command sequences. The system prioritizes signal fidelity over throughput, ensuring that every instruction arrives uncorrupted at the execution layer.
